ddls:
CREATE TABLE "planets" (
  "planet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planet */,
  "planet_name" TEXT /* Name of the planet */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the planet */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender associated with the planet */,
  "revolution_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the planet's revolution around the Earth */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the planet's icon */,
  "distance_from_earth" TEXT /* Distance of the planet from Earth */,
  "orbital_period" TEXT /* Orbital period of the planet around the Sun */,
  "rotation_period" TEXT /* Rotation period of the planet */,
  "surface_temperature" TEXT /* Average surface temperature of the planet */,
  "atmospheric_composition" TEXT /* Composition of the planet's atmosphere */,
  "symbol_url" TEXT /* URL of the planet's symbol */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the planet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deities" (
  "deity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deity */,
  "deity_name" TEXT /* Name of the deity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the deity */,
  "planet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated planet */,
  "symbol_url" TEXT /* URL of the deity's symbol */,
  "mythological_stories" TEXT /* Text content of mythological stories associated with the deity */,
  "cultural_significance" TEXT /* Description of the deity's significance in different cultures */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the deity's icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deities_planet_id FOREIGN KEY ("planet_id") REFERENCES planets ("planet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antharyami_roopa" (
  "roopa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbolic representation */,
  "roopa_name" TEXT /* Name of the symbolic representation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symbolic representation */,
  "planet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated planet */,
  "symbol_url" TEXT /* URL of the symbolic representation's symbol */,
  "cultural_significance" TEXT /* Description of the symbolic representation's significance in different cultures */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the symbolic representation's icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roopa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_antharyami_roopa_planet_id FOREIGN KEY ("planet_id") REFERENCES planets ("planet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "language_preferences" TEXT /* Languages preferred by the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's biography or description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "astrological_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each astrological reading */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the reading */,
  "planet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planet for which the reading is done */,
  "reading_date" TEXT /* Date when the reading was created */,
  "reading_text" TEXT /* Text content of the astrological reading */,
  "reading_type" TEXT /* Type of astrological reading */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the reading */,
  "reading_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the reading */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating of the reading */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User's comments on the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_astrological_readings_planet_id FOREIGN KEY ("planet_id") REFERENCES planets ("planet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_astrological_readings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., article, video, podcast) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the content is available */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the content */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the content */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the content has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the content has received */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Average rating of the content */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "expertise_area" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the author */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's profile picture */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the author */,
  "number_of_publications" INTEGER /* Number of publications by the author */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the author's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_catalog" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Current inventory count */,
  "planet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated planet */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "reviews_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "features" TEXT /* Key features of the product */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_catalog_planet_id FOREIGN KEY ("planet_id") REFERENCES planets ("planet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the user */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES product_catalog ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic to which the post belongs */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the post was made */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text content of the forum post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post */,
  "post_status" TEXT /* Status of the post */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "replies_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the post */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES forum_topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "planet_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated planet */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the topic */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the topic has received */,
  "posts_count" INTEGER /* Number of posts in the topic */,
  "last_post_date" TEXT /* Date of the last post in the topic */,
  "sticky" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the topic is sticky */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_topics_planet_id FOREIGN KEY ("planet_id") REFERENCES planets ("planet_id")
)
